caption: The video features a man seated at a desk in what appears to be a podcast or radio studio setting. He is wearing a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed on it, a white cap, and headphones. In front of him is a microphone with a pop filter, and he is holding a smartphone in one hand and a CD in the other. The background includes banners with the text "UNIQUE HUSTLE" and "Where BOSSES Talk!" suggesting that this is a segment from a show called "Boss Talk 101." The man seems engaged, possibly discussing or presenting something related to the CD while interacting with his audience through the microphone. The overall atmosphere suggests a casual yet professional discussion or interview format.
